src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in JDK 21 / Spring Boot 3 environment; must use jakarta.annotation.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ / 6.x API changes required for JDK 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated and removed in newer Spring Security versions; extending it causes compilation errors or runtime failures in modern Spring Boot setups targeting JDK 21.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6.x method security configuration.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6.x; using it results in compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace deprecated configure(AuthenticationManagerBuilder) method with explicit DaoAuthenticationProvider and AuthenticationManager beans.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: The configure(AuthenticationManagerBuilder) method is removed in Spring Security 6.x; authentication must be configured via beans.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace deprecated configure(HttpSecurity) method with SecurityFilterChain bean using lambda DSL.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: The configure(HttpSecurity) method is removed in Spring Security 6.x; security configuration must be defined via SecurityFilterChain beans.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace deprecated configure(WebSecurity) method with requestMatchers inside SecurityFilterChain for static resource ignoring.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: The configure(WebSecurity) method is removed in Spring Security 6.x; static resources must be permitted via requestMatchers in the filter chain.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity configuration to use lambda DSL and modern API methods (authorizeHttpRequests, requestMatchers) replacing deprecated antMatchers and chain methods.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: antMatchers and the old chain-style configuration are deprecated/removed in Spring Security 6.x; using them causes compilation errors.
